name: Synopsys, Inc.
description: Synopsys, Inc. is a leading global provider of electronic design automation (EDA) software, silicon intellectual property (IP), and software security solutions. Headquartered in the United States, the company specializes in engineering solutions that span from silicon to systems, enabling customers to design, verify, and manufacture advanced semiconductor chips and electronic systems. Synopsys plays a critical role in the technology industry by providing the tools and expertise necessary to accelerate innovation in artificial intelligence, automotive, high-performance computing, and mobile markets, helping companies bring complex, AI-powered products to market faster and more efficiently.
